name: lorcan-claude-marketplace
description: Lorcan's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: review-code
plugins.description: Use when reviewing a local branch diff or a GitHub PR. Produces a local Markdown report with confidence-ranked findings and permalinks. Never posts to GitHub, never mutates files.

plugins.name: simplify-code
plugins.description: Use when the user asks to simplify, tidy, clean up, deduplicate, or remove dead code from local files. Accepts branch diff vs base (default), staged changes, working tree, or specified paths. Produces a confidence-scored proposal report and applies the survivors (proposal only in plan mode).

plugins.name: describe-pr
plugins.description: Write a conventional-commits title and PR description for the current branch. Reads the raw diff vs base, asks only what the diff cannot answer, enforces humanised prose, and adds a Mermaid diagram where it helps. Never pushes, commits, or opens a PR.

plugins.name: humanize-text
plugins.description: Rewrite text to remove signs of AI-generated writing. Catches inflated significance, promotional language, em-dash overuse, AI vocabulary, bolded-header bullets, sycophantic openers, and more. Works on pasted text or files in place.

plugins.name: author-plugin
plugins.description: Generate a Claude Code plugin from a plain-English requirement. Picks the right surfaces (skills, subagents, hooks, MCP servers, reference docs), scaffolds files, checks them against a deterministic rubric, returns a fresh-context reviewer verdict, and proposes a marketplace.json diff.

plugins.name: handle-review
plugins.description: Use when responding to code review or other critical feedback (PR comments, design review, written critique). Enforces verify-before-implement, reasoned push-back, one-item-at-a-time execution, and no performative agreement. Includes read-only gh helpers for PR context.
